reference: I have been experiencing low libido. I do get an erection but am unable to maintain it. I feel irritation in the veins of my penis, which has changed color and looks white, as if it has pus inside. Additionally, I feel irritation on the left side of my pelvic bone, giving me the impression that there may be some infection inside. Recently, my wife has also suffered from yeast infections.
